channel.title: Eternal Record
channel.description: Daily cinematic mythology stories — 90-second vertical videos.
channel.itunes:author: Ayush Rana

item.title: The Wrath of Kumbhakarna
item.description: Today's story will change how you see everything... In a time of peace, a great hero named Rama ruled Ayodhya, his kingdom flourished and his people prospered. But Rama's brother, Kumbhakarna, a giant of a man, slept through the festivities, oblivious to the world's joy. He slept for a thousand years, his kingdom's prosperity a distant dream to him. But when he awoke, his wrath boiled over like a volcano. He demanded to know why no one had woken him, why no one had fed him. Rama tried to appease him, but Kumbhakarna's rage only grew. He attacked the gods themselves, his massive fist shattering the earth. Ravana, the demon king, saw an opportunity and joined forces with Kumbhakarna. Together they brought Rama's kingdom to its knees. This is Wrath — the unrelenting fury that consumes everything in its path. Today, we live in a world where anger is a virus, spreading faster than ever before, ask yourself, do you let your rage sleep, or do you let it devour you?
